name: fannie-mae-underwriting-wiki
description: Fannie Mae underwriting knowledge system built with Quartz

scripts.setup: git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/jackyzha0/quartz.git .quartz && cd .quartz && npm install
scripts.preview: cd .quartz && npx quartz build --directory ../wiki --output ../public && npx quartz serve
scripts.install-and-build: npm run setup && npm run build
